pages.title: Electrical Engineer
pages.text: Discipline 3 of $(l:classes/engineer)Engineer$(/l). The Create Additions FE power economy — generation, storage, transmission. Twenty-one items.

pages.title: Generation and transmission
pages.text: $(bold)Electric Motor, Alternator.$(/) Generation. Electric Motor is also the Aero interlock anchor.$(br2)$(bold)Connectors$(/) — small, large, and small-light. Plus Redstone Relay, Digital Adapter, Barbed Wire.

pages.title: Storage
pages.text: $(bold)Capacitor, Accumulator.$(/) Base storage.$(br2)$(bold)Modular Accumulator, Tesla Coil, Portable Energy Interface.$(/) Top tier — each requires a Mechanical Press (hub interlock).$(br2)Electrum ingots, sheets, and rods stay open as base alloy. Spools and wires are class-gated.$(br2)Matching trader: the Mechanist.
